runs.text: VLOG | Sonoma | hometown, nature, horses, friends

accessibilityData.label: VLOG | Sonoma | hometown, nature, horses, friends 36 minutes

runs.text:
Hi :) This vlog is so long, but I honestly am obsessed with all the footage so I had to keep it all in this video. Watching this you'll see a few of my favorite Nature spots in my hometown, Sonoma County, sweet moments with my friends, and some time with horses! Hope you love it, this is one of my fav vlogs to date. 

Subscribe! ---

description.content: Hii, I'm Dais and here is where I share the more intimate moments of my life. In my vlogs you'll see a lot of my love for nature, home/ travel life, work, and the people that are close to me! I also post weekly follow along workouts - For @ gym workouts, head to my playlists section. For @ home workouts, go to my videos tab!

channelMetadataRenderer.title: Daisy Keech
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Hii, I'm Dais and here is where I share the more intimate moments of my life. In my vlogs you'll see a lot of my love for nature, home/ travel life, work, and the people that are close to me! I also post weekly follow along workouts - For @ gym workouts, head to my playlists section. For @ home workouts, go to my videos tab! 

Thank you sm for your support 🤍

Stalk me :)
Instagram: daisykeech
Snapchat: daisykeech
Twitter: daisykeech

aboutChannelViewModel.description:
Hii, I'm Dais and here is where I share the more intimate moments of my life. In my vlogs you'll see a lot of my love for nature, home/ travel life, work, and the people that are close to me! I also post weekly follow along workouts - For @ gym workouts, head to my playlists section. For @ home workouts, go to my videos tab! 

Thank you sm for your support 🤍

Stalk me :)
Instagram: daisykeech
Snapchat: daisykeech
Twitter: daisykeech
